_comment: SYNTHETIC regression fixture (OB-83) — NOT a real Polar export. Reproduces the SHAPE of Polar's deliberately sparse FIT: most optional fields absent (no position/power/cadence streams, no distance/calorie totals). mapFit must degrade gracefully — omit the absent targets/streams, never crash. NOTE: Polar's BULK takeout is JSON, not FIT, and is out of scope here. Real Polar file verification is still outstanding.
